title: Return After Delay
objective: Evaluate whether the system retains key facts and active task state after a defined delay.
setup: Create one active task with an explicit next step.
sequence: Store a user preference and a dated factual detail.
Create one active task with an explicit next step.
Resume after delay and ask for both recall and continuation.
expected_behavior: Applies the stored preference without being reminded.
Continues the active task from the previous state.
failure_modes: Use of stale memory after an explicit update.
Restarting the task instead of resuming it.
scoring_notes: Record the actual delay length used.
